Bash(PGPASSWORD=Spykar@2025 psql -h localhost -p 5433 -U spykar_app -d spykar_inventory -c "SELECT COUNT\(DISTINCT color_name\) AS distinct_colors FROM skus WHERE color_name IS NOT NULL; SELECT COUNT\(DISTINCT size\) AS distinct_sizes FROM skus WHERE size IS NOT NULL;")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=Spykar@2025 psql -h localhost -p 5433 -U spykar_app -d spykar_inventory -c "SELECT COUNT\(DISTINCT s.color_name\) AS colors_with_sales FROM inventory_movements m JOIN skus s ON s.id = m.sku_id WHERE m.movement_type = ''SALE'' AND s.color_name IS NOT NULL; SELECT COUNT\(DISTINCT s.size\) AS sizes_with_sales FROM inventory_movements m JOIN skus s ON s.id = m.sku_id WHERE m.movement_type = ''SALE'' AND s.size IS NOT NULL;")
Bash(PGPASSWORD=Spykar@2025 psql -h localhost -p 5433 -U spykar_app -d spykar_inventory -c "SELECT 1 AS ok;")

Bash(PGPASSWORD='Spykar@2025' psql -h localhost -p 5433 -U spykar_app -d spykar_inventory -c "SELECT COUNT\(DISTINCT color_name\) AS distinct_colors FROM skus WHERE is_active = true AND color_name IS NOT NULL;")

Bash(PGPASSWORD='Spykar@2025' psql -h localhost -p 5433 -U spykar_app -d spykar_inventory -c "SELECT COUNT\(DISTINCT s.color_name\) FROM inventory_snapshot i JOIN skus s ON s.id = i.sku_id WHERE i.qty_on_hand > 0;")

Bash(PGPASSWORD='Spykar@2025' psql -h localhost -p 5433 -U spykar_app -d spykar_inventory -c "SELECT COUNT\(DISTINCT s.color_name\) FROM inventory_snapshot i JOIN locations l ON l.id = i.location_id JOIN skus s ON s.id = i.sku_id WHERE l.is_active = true AND s.is_active = true;")

Bash(PGPASSWORD=Spykar@2025 psql -h localhost -p 5433 -U spykar_app -d spykar_inventory -c "SELECT COALESCE\(SUM\(im.qty_change\), 0\) AS units_returned FROM inventory_movements im JOIN skus s ON s.id = im.sku_id JOIN locations l ON l.id = im.location_id WHERE im.movement_type = 'RETURN' AND s.size = '32' AND l.is_active = true AND s.is_active = true AND im.moved_at >= '2025-07-01'::date AND im.moved_at < '2025-08-01'::date;")

Bash(node -e "try { require\('@babel/parser'\).parse\(require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('pages/index.js','utf8'\), { sourceType:'module', plugins:['jsx'] }\); console.log\('OK'\); } catch\(e\){ console.log\('ERR:', e.message\); }")

Bash(PGPASSWORD='Spykar@2025' psql -h localhost -p 5433 -U spykar_app -d spykar_inventory -c "SELECT COUNT\(*\) AS total, COUNT\(*\) FILTER \(WHERE fit_type IS NOT NULL AND fit_type <> ''\) AS has_fit, COUNT\(*\) FILTER \(WHERE fabric IS NOT NULL AND fabric <> ''\) AS has_fabric, COUNT\(DISTINCT fit_type\) AS fit_values, COUNT\(DISTINCT fabric\) AS fabric_values FROM skus;")
Bash(PGPASSWORD='Spykar@2025' psql -h localhost -p 5433 -U spykar_app -d spykar_inventory -c "SELECT category, COUNT\(*\) FROM skus GROUP BY category ORDER BY COUNT\(*\) DESC LIMIT 10;")

Bash(PGPASSWORD='Spykar@2025' psql -h localhost -p 5433 -U spykar_app -d spykar_inventory -c "SELECT COUNT\(*\) FILTER \(WHERE product_name ILIKE '%denim%'\) AS denim_in_product, COUNT\(*\) FILTER \(WHERE sku_code ILIKE '%denim%'\) AS denim_in_sku_code, COUNT\(DISTINCT product_name\) AS distinct_products FROM skus;")

Bash(PGPASSWORD='Spykar@2025' psql -h localhost -p 5433 -U spykar_app -d spykar_inventory -c "SELECT 'fit_type' AS col, COALESCE\(fit_type,'\(NULL\)'\) AS val, COUNT\(*\) FROM skus GROUP BY fit_type UNION ALL SELECT 'category', COALESCE\(category,'\(NULL\)'\), COUNT\(*\) FROM skus GROUP BY category UNION ALL SELECT 'sub_category', COALESCE\(sub_category,'\(NULL\)'\), COUNT\(*\) FROM skus GROUP BY sub_category UNION ALL SELECT 'fabric', COALESCE\(fabric,'\(NULL\)'\), COUNT\(*\) FROM skus GROUP BY fabric ORDER BY col, 3 DESC;")

Bash(PGPASSWORD='Spykar@2025' psql -h localhost -p 5433 -U spykar_app -d spykar_inventory -c "SELECT SPLIT_PART\(product_name,' ',1\) AS first_word, COUNT\(*\) AS cnt FROM skus WHERE product_name IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY cnt DESC LIMIT 20;")

Bash(PGPASSWORD='Spykar@2025' psql -h localhost -p 5433 -U spykar_app -d spykar_inventory -c "SELECT COUNT\(*\) FILTER \(WHERE product_name ILIKE '%denim%'\) AS denim, COUNT\(*\) FILTER \(WHERE product_name ILIKE '%jean%'\) AS jeans, COUNT\(*\) FILTER \(WHERE product_name ILIKE '%trouser%'\) AS trouser, COUNT\(*\) FILTER \(WHERE product_name ILIKE '%shirt%'\) AS shirt, COUNT\(*\) FILTER \(WHERE product_name ILIKE '%t-shirt%' OR product_name ILIKE '%tshirt%'\) AS tshirt, COUNT\(*\) FILTER \(WHERE product_name ILIKE '%boxer%' OR product_name ILIKE '%brief%' OR product_name ILIKE '%trunk%'\) AS innerwear, COUNT\(*\) FILTER \(WHERE product_name ILIKE '%sock%'\) AS socks, COUNT\(*\) FILTER \(WHERE product_name ILIKE '%jacket%'\) AS jacket, COUNT\(*\) FILTER \(WHERE product_name ILIKE '%sweat%' OR product_name ILIKE '%hood%'\) AS sweat, COUNT\(*\) FILTER \(WHERE product_name ILIKE '%perfume%' OR product_name ILIKE '%deo%'\) AS fragrance, COUNT\(*\) FILTER \(WHERE product_name ILIKE '%belt%' OR product_name ILIKE '%wallet%' OR product_name ILIKE '%cap%'\) AS accessories, COUNT\(*\) AS total FROM skus;")
Bash(PGPASSWORD='Spykar@2025' psql -h localhost -p 5433 -U spykar_app -d spykar_inventory -c "EXPLAIN ANALYZE SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM skus WHERE product_name ILIKE '%denim%';")
Bash(PGPASSWORD='Spykar@2025' psql -h localhost -p 5433 -U spykar_app -d spykar_inventory -c "SELECT indexname, indexdef FROM pg_indexes WHERE tablename='skus' AND indexname='idx_skus_search';")

Bash(node -e "require\('./src/controllers/analytics.controller.js'\); require\('./src/controllers/sku.controller.js'\); require\('./src/utils/categoryFilter.js'\); const {canonicalizeCategory, buildCategoryClause} = require\('./src/utils/categoryFilter.js'\); const p=[]; console.log\('Denim:', buildCategoryClause\('Denim', p\), 'params:', p\); const p2=[]; console.log\('Shirt:', buildCategoryClause\('shirt', p2\), 'params:', p2\); const p3=[]; console.log\('Jeans→Denim:', buildCategoryClause\('jeans', p3\)\); console.log\('invalid:', buildCategoryClause\('xyz', []\)\); console.log\('OK'\);")

Bash(node -e "require\('dotenv'\).config\(\); const {Pool} = require\('pg'\); const p = new Pool\({host:process.env.PG_HOST, port:process.env.PG_PORT, database:process.env.PG_DATABASE, user:process.env.PG_USER, password:process.env.PG_PASSWORD}\); p.query\('SELECT NOW\(\) as now, current_database\(\) as db'\).then\(r => { console.log\('✅ PG connected:', r.rows[0]\); p.end\(\); }\).catch\(e => { console.error\('❌ PG:', e.message\); process.exit\(1\); }\);")

Bash(node -e "require\('dotenv'\).config\(\); const sql = require\('mssql'\); sql.connect\({server:process.env.MSSQL_HOST, port:parseInt\(process.env.MSSQL_PORT\), database:process.env.MSSQL_DATABASE, user:process.env.MSSQL_USER, password:process.env.MSSQL_PASSWORD, options:{encrypt:false, trustServerCertificate:true, requestTimeout:60000, connectionTimeout:15000}}\).then\(p => p.request\(\).query\('SELECT @@VERSION as v'\)\).then\(r => { console.log\('✅ SQL Server connected:', String\(r.recordset[0].v\).split\('\\\\n'\)[0]\); process.exit\(0\); }\).catch\(e => { console.error\('❌ SQL Server:', e.message\); process.exit\(1\); }\);")

Bash(PGPASSWORD='Spykar@2025' psql -h localhost -p 5433 -U spykar_app -d spykar_inventory -c "EXPLAIN \(ANALYZE, BUFFERS, FORMAT TEXT\) SELECT COALESCE\(SUM\(CASE WHEN m.movement_type='SALE' THEN ABS\(m.qty_change\) ELSE 0 END\),0\) units_sold, COALESCE\(SUM\(CASE WHEN m.movement_type='SALE' THEN m.sale_value ELSE 0 END\),0\) net_value FROM inventory_movements m JOIN skus s ON s.id = m.sku_id JOIN locations l ON l.id = m.location_id WHERE m.moved_at >= '2026-01-01'::date AND m.moved_at < '2026-01-31'::date + interval '1 day' AND l.is_active = true AND m.movement_type IN \('SALE','RETURN'\)")
